response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates a strong background in geospatial data (GISCollective, Green Map Association) and distributed systems (Dunnhumby media, re:cinq), with relevant experience in C++ (National Instruments) and Rust-alternative languages like D. However, his primary expertise leans toward web/mobile development and AI-agent infrastructure rather than routing/navigation systems or high-performance C++ pipelines. His lack of explicit mention of modern C++ for routing tiling or navigation guidance is a notable gap.
strengths: Proven experience with geospatial data processing (GISCollective, Green Map Association) and distributed systems (Dunnhumby media)
Strong background in C++ (National Instruments) and modern software engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, microservices)
Diverse technical stack adaptation, showing ability to learn and apply new technologies
concerns: Limited direct experience with routing/navigation systems or routing tile optimization
Primary expertise in web/mobile development and AI, with less focus on high-performance C++ pipelines
No explicit mention of Rust or geospatial data transformation tools for routing tiling
